ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "walk_count" INTEGER /* Number of walks (activities) undertaken by the user */,
  "view_count" INTEGER /* Number of views (content interactions) by the user */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user (M/F) */,
  "payment_amount" REAL /* Total payment amount made by the user */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Country code of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the service */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Last date the user logged in */,
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user segment */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_segment_id FOREIGN KEY ("segment_id") REFERENCES user_segments ("segment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_code" TEXT /* Unique country code */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Currency code used in the country */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent the country belongs to */,
  "population" TEXT /* Population of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_segments" (
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each segment */,
  "segment_name" TEXT /* Name of the user segment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the user segment */,
  "criteria" TEXT /* Criteria used to define the segment */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the segment was created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Last date the segment was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("segment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment transaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user making the payment */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date of the payment transaction */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount paid in the transaction */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., completed, pending, failed) */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the payment */,
  "receipt_id" TEXT /* Receipt ID for the payment */,
  "is_recurring" INTEGER /* Indicates if the payment is part of a recurring subscription */,
  "subscription_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the subscription */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_subscription_id FOREIGN KEY ("subscription_id") REFERENCES subscriptions ("subscription_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_behaviors" (
  "behavior_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each behavioral record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user performing the activity */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the activity occurred */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., walk, view) */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., mobile, desktop) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user when the activity occurred */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the activity */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("behavior_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_behaviors_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., user engagement, payment trends) */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report findings */,
  "generated_by" TEXT /* User or system that generated the report */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path of the generated report */,
  "is_archived" INTEGER /* Indicates if the report is archived */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subscriptions" (
  "subscription_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subscription */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user subscribed to the plan */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the subscription */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the subscription */,
  "plan_type" TEXT /* Type of subscription plan (e.g., basic, premium) */,
  "renewal_date" TEXT /* Next renewal date of the subscription */,
  "renewal_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the subscription renewal (e.g., monthly, annually) */,
  "is_autorenew" INTEGER /* Indicates if the subscription is set to auto-renew */,
  "discount_code" TEXT /* Discount code applied to the subscription */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the subscription (e.g., active, expired) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subscription_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subscriptions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user receiving the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the notification message */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Indicates if the notification has been read */,
  "sent_by" TEXT /* User or system that sent the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback submission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who submitted feedback */,
  "submitted_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was submitted */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Text of the user comments */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user (scale of 1 to 5) */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback (e.g., feature request, bug report) */,
  "is_resolved" INTEGER /* Indicates if the feedback has been resolved */,
  "resolved_by" TEXT /* User or system that resolved the feedback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity_logs" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user performing the activity */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the logged activity */,
  "activity_description" TEXT /* Description of the activity performed by the user */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., login, logout, view) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., mobile, desktop) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
